summary: Failed (timeout): The test tried to click the text "4", but Playwright reported that a sibling/parent card element with classes like "gradient-border hover-lift fade-in step-glow visible" was intercepting pointer events. This usually means the clickable text is visually present but not actually the topmost interactive element, often due to an overlay, animation layer, or incorrect stacking context/z-index on the hosting side. The element may also be mid-animation and unstable, causing the click…
